tech_news.title: Apple introduces monthly subscriptions with a 12-month commitment on the App Store - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: Developers can now set up and test monthly subscriptions with a 12-month commitment on the App Store, ahead of the public rollout nex month.

tech_news.title: Open source package with 1 million monthly downloads stole user credentials - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: If you're one of millions using element-data, it's time to check for compromise.

tech_news.title: Rugrats: Retro Rewind Collection Will Bring PS1, N64, & GB Favourites To Switch This May - Nintendo Life
tech_news.description: Includes Search for Reptar, Studio Tour, and more!

tech_news.title: Gemini app preps ‘Proactive Assistance’ and new Gemini voices - 9to5Google
tech_news.description: Google’s goal with Gemini is to build a personal, proactive, and powerful assistant. The Gemini app is now readying “Proactive Assistance.”

tech_news.title: Apple releases beta 4 for iPadOS 26.5, tvOS 26.5, and more [U] - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: Apple moves its lineup of 26.5 software updates closer to launch today, with beta 4 available now for iPadOS 26.5, tvOS 26.5, and more.

tech_news.title: Valve launches the Steam Controller without the Steam Machine - The Verge
tech_news.description: Valve is releasing the Steam Controller on May 4th for $99. It was originally designed alongside the Steam Machine, but will now launch separately.

tech_news.title: Clicks Communicator Phone Gets Big Update on When It Launches - Droid Life
tech_news.description: Back in January at CES, we got a first look at the Clicks Communicator, a phone from some of the biggest fans of Blackberry devices who wanted to bring back the idea of a device with a physical keyboard. At the time, they only had dummy units to show off, but…

tech_news.title: 32-Inch Wheels Are Leaving Everyday Riders Behind - Outside Magazine
tech_news.description: The cycling industry says a massive new standard is faster and inevitable. You aren't buying it, and that is exactly the right stance.

tech_news.title: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds ‘Captain Majima Content Drop’ update launches April 29 - Gematsu
tech_news.description: The “Captain Majima Content Drop” update for Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds will launch on April 29 at 5:00 p.m. PT / 8:00 p.m. ET, SEGA announced.

tech_news.title: Samsung’s first smart glasses have leaked - The Verge
tech_news.description: Leaked images of the Samsung Galaxy Glasses show a design that’s very similar to the Ray-Ban Meta glasses Samsung’s pair will be competing with.
